sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Hmm, the board looks the same. The second click didn't change another block. Let me check what changed - maybe the same block changed again or something else happened. Let me count green blocks to see if any more were converted.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check how many green blocks remain
seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5]
print(f"Green blocks: {len(greens)}")
for g in greens:
    b = g['boundary']
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  center={center}, pixels={g['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
